metadata.description: Environment name (dev/test/prod). Used for naming + tags.
Optional tags applied to all resources.
Container image for the .NET API (fully qualified, e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/project1-api:1.0.0).
Container image for the Python pipeline job (fully qualified, e.g. myacr.azurecr.io/idp-pipeline:1.0.0).
Enable Cosmos DB free tier where available.
Azure OpenAI API version used by the Python pipeline.
Azure OpenAI deployment name expected by the Python pipeline (AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT).
Azure OpenAI model name for the deployment (varies by region/availability).
Azure OpenAI model version for the deployment. Optional; set to match your region quota/model catalog.
Document Intelligence model ID used by the pipeline (e.g. prebuilt-document).
Whether to create the Azure OpenAI model deployment via IaC. If false, create it manually and just set AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT.
Whether to create the model deployment in Azure OpenAI.

variables.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage', 'value', parameters('storageConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'value', '~4'), createObject('name', 'FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME', 'value', 'python'), createObject('name', 'PYTHON_ENABLE_WORKER_EXTENSIONS', 'value', '1'), createObject('name', 'DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('documentIntelligenceEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_KEY', 'value', parameters('documentIntelligenceKey')), createObject('name', 'DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_MODEL', 'value', parameters('documentIntelligenceModelId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('azureOpenAIEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY', 'value', parameters('azureOpenAIKey')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('azureOpenAIDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION', 'value', parameters('azureOpenAIApiVersion')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_KEY', 'value', parameters('cosmosKey')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosDatabase')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_CONTAINER', 'value', parameters('cosmosContainer'))), if(empty(parameters('applicationInsightsConnectionString')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('applicationInsightsConnectionString')))))]
